/brag
Directory Add yours

Add your /brag

A /brag page is a section of your personal site where you document your wins, projects, and who you are professionally. Add yourself to the directory by opening a pull request — no account needed beyond GitHub.

Your entry

0 / 200

How to submit

  1. 1 Fork the repository on GitHub
  2. 2 Open src/data/brags.json and paste your generated JSON at the end of the array
  3. 3 Open a pull request titled Add [Your Name]
your entry 
{
  "name": "",
  "brag_url": "",
  "description": ""
}

Paste this object at the end of the array in src/data/brags.json
